title: Call of the Night Custom GUI Pack
description: This pack is themed after "Call of the Night” and features a dark purple, pink, and light blue color palette.
body: ![Call of the Night GUI Pack preview showing themed Minecraft menus](https://i.imgur.com/TzfIm0d.jpeg) ### Introduction This is a **GUI-only resource pack**, so you can freely use it with other resource packs, just place it **on top** of the resource pack you already use. This pack is themed after *"Call of the Night”* and features a **dark purple, pink, and light blue** color palette. I've customized the hot bar and added unique images to each container to better match the series' aesthetic. Like some of my newer packs, this one includes **scaled containers**, which required significant re-adjustments after resizing. This makes the pack visually distinct from my older releases. If you’d like to see alternative color schemes in the future, such as **white & red** or any other combinations, feel free to suggest them, and I’ll consider it. If you find any bugs, please report them so I can fix them as soon as possible. Community Engagement: Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest future packs, participate in anime discussions, and enter monthly giveaways for Discord Nitro! 🔗 Visit our relaunched website for more content, packs, and updates! ### Images: * **Settings** ![Minecraft settings menu with Call of the Night themed GUI](https://i.imgur.com/LhrjHG4.png) * **HUD** ![In-game HUD showing Call of the Night themed hotbar and UI](https://i.imgur.com/xZDBypK.png) * **Creative Menu** ![Creative inventory menu with Call of the Night GUI design](https://i.imgur.com/9vHmDoL.png) * **Anvil** ![Anvil interface styled with Call of the Night GUI pack](https://i.imgur.com/nbNOEAd.png) * **Blast Furnace** ![Blast furnace menu using Call of the Night themed textures](https://i.imgur.com/jjOCUKH.png) * **Smoker** ![Smoker interface with Call of the Night GUI visuals](https://i.imgur.com/vBKSahQ.png) * **Grindstone** ![Grindstone menu featuring Call of the Night GUI style](https://i.imgur.com/j8MtNhb.png) * **Beacon Menu** ![Beacon interface redesigned with Call of the Night GUI pack](https://i.imgur.com/edGk23b.png) * **Villager Trading Menu** ![Villager trading screen with Call of the Night themed GUI](https://i.imgur.com/nEtTttp.png) ### Additional Resources: * 💬 [Join the Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest future packs, vote on designs, and participate in anime discussions ### ❤️ Thank You for Your Support! Your feedback helps improve future packs , enjoy the resource pack and have fun.
